text_en: Yeah, go to softskills.audio and click the ask a question button where you can fill out our form. You can type in as many tokens as you want there. I don't think Google charges us for the token, thankfully. Although one day I'm sure they will.
text: 可以去 softskills.audio，点击“ask a question”按钮，在那里填写我们的表单。你想输入多少 token 都行。好在 Google 现在应该还不会按 token 向我们收费。虽然我敢肯定，总有一天他们会的。

text_en: Yep.
text: 对。

text_en: But thank you so much to everyone who writes in with your questions. We really appreciate them. Keep them coming.
